chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitution Petition No.S-522 of 2017. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For order son office objection at flag.A. For orders on maintainability. Notice issued to respondents No. 1 to 2 and AAG. 12.06.2017. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Qazi Muhammad Bux State Counsel. ---------------- Respondents No.2 and 3 have appeared and filed their statements, which are taken on record copies thereof are provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner after going through the statement seeks disposal of this petition. Order accordingly. The official respondents are directed not to cause harassment to the petitioner in any manner whatsoever and legal protection may be provided to the petitioner. Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E S Ashfaq
